task_description: Implement Phase 3 (Advanced Scheduling) for NexusQueue: delayed jobs via sorted sets, priority queues with weighted fair processing, recurring/cron jobs with cron-parser, and rate limiting via token bucket Lua script. Also refactor retry to use delayed sorted set instead of setTimeout.

verification.summary: Build succeeds across all 3 workspaces. All 40 tests pass (10 phase1 + 9 phase2 + 21 phase3). Tests exercise real code paths: delayed enqueue verifies ZADD to sorted set, scheduler tests seed past-due jobs and verify promotion, priority tests confirm routing to correct lists, rate limiter tests verify token consumption and denial logic, retry tests confirm ZADD to delayed set instead of setTimeout.
